layer_stack.name: PLANNING
layer_stack.question: Is this well thought out?
layer_stack.gate: Must include steps, owner, risks, outcome

layer_stack.name: ARCHITECTURE
layer_stack.question: Can this actually be built?
layer_stack.gate: Technically feasible + compatible with existing system

layer_stack.name: EXECUTION_DESIGN
layer_stack.question: Exactly how will this be implemented?
layer_stack.gate: Every task assigned, no ambiguous steps

layer_stack.name: VALIDATION
layer_stack.question: Does this meet standards?
layer_stack.gate: ALL tests pass — any failure returns to Planning

layer_stack.name: GOVERNANCE
layer_stack.question: Should this be allowed?
layer_stack.gate: ALL audits clear — any failure = BLUE-1 or GOLD-1

layer_stack.name: BOARDROOM
layer_stack.question: Do we collectively agree?
layer_stack.gate: Weighted majority — audit veto triggers Gatekeeper review

terminal_gate.name: GATEKEEPER
terminal_gate.question: Do I allow this into reality?
terminal_gate.input: Fully validated, audited, debated proposal with vote record
